title: ricinocarpodendron cumingianum
intro: Ricinocarpodendron cumingianum, also known as the Cuming's sterculia or Philippine sterculia, is a plant species native to the Philippines and is classified under the family Sterculiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Ricinocarpodendron cumingianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
